message:
refactor(linalg): rewrite inv_nxn via lu_solve_multi and optimize cholesky_solve_multi

Refactor inv_nxn to build an identity matrix and delegate to the new
lu_solve_multi public function, which solves A*X=B for multiple RHS
columns in a single LU factorization pass operating directly on the
output buffer.

Rewrite cholesky_solve_multi to perform forward and backward
substitution in-place, reading L[j,i] for L^T[i,j] to eliminate the
column-major intermediate allocation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
